## Description
Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CloudFormation template update

## Testing
- [ ] Tested CloudFormation template validation
- [ ] Tested deployment in dev/test environment
- [ ] Tested cleanup/deletion

## Checklist
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No sensitive data (credentials, account IDs) included
- [ ] Changes follow existing code style

## Related Issues
Fixes #(issue number)
